main_themes: The Screen-Time Prison (Wasting months of life per year)
The Engine Fuel (Potential vs God's Love)
Who lives through your body? (Sloth vs Christ)

nuggets.idea_one_liner: You are spending 4.5 months of every year staring at a glass rectangle while your parents wonder why you haven't retired them yet.
nuggets.proof_quote: When we divided that by 30, we got 4.55 [months]. ... You've been slacking your life away.

creator_notes.tone: Brutally honest and math-driven. (V4 Reprocessed Output).
